topic: Hormuz escalation and regional mediation watch
questions: What fresh claims about talks, force movements, and shipping disruption are circulating right now?

claims.claim_text: Indirect mediation contacts are still active.
US regional airlift activity has intensified.

findings.post_text_raw: A significant movement is underway from US Army, Navy and Air Force bases in CONUS to the Middle East comprised of at least 35 C-17 flights since March 12th.
findings.post_summary: SentDefender says at least 35 C-17 flights moved from CONUS into the Middle East since March 12.
findings.media_summary: Attached chart lists Fort Stewart, JBLM, Ovda Air Base, and King Faisal Air Base.
findings.combined_summary: SentDefender claims at least 35 C-17 flights moved into the region, with the attached chart listing CONUS origins and Israeli and Jordanian destinations.
findings.discovery_reason: High-engagement X post surfaced by last30days cross-platform discovery.

web.summary: Reuters says mediators remain in contact and no public breakthrough has been announced.
web.discovery_reason: last30days web scan found a same-day Reuters update.

web.summary: Axios card captured by last30days says the White House is still trying to keep an indirect channel open.

polymarket.summary: A two-day-old market note says traders still price a delayed reopening.
polymarket.discovery_reason: Older context kept for background only.
